name: zora-blog
description: 程序员猫奴露营博客 — Tech-Outdoor Fusion

scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.format: npm run format -w zora-blog-frontend && npm run format -w zora-blog-backend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check -w zora-blog-frontend && npm run format:check -w zora-blog-backend
